name: MSI MAG X870E TOMAHAWK WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8400(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C with DP-Alt - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (X870ETMAHAWKWIFI)
shortName: MSI MAG X870E TOMAHAWK WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: Mid-range ATX motherboard for AMD AM5 CPUs with DDR5 support, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 7.
